root_text.an3.147:1.1: “Tīhi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgato yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ niraye.
root_text.an3.147:1.3: Sāvajjena kāyakammena, sāvajjena vacīkammena, sāvajjena manokammena—
root_text.an3.147:1.4: Imehi kho, bhikkhave, tīhi dhammehi samannāgato yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ niraye.
root_text.an3.147:2.1: Tīhi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgato yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ sagge.
root_text.an3.147:2.3: Anavajjena kāyakammena, anavajjena vacīkammena, anavajjena manokammena—

translation_text.an3.147:1.1: “Someone with three qualities is placed in hell as if delivered there.
translation_text.an3.147:1.3: Blameworthy deeds by way of body, speech, and mind.
translation_text.an3.147:1.4: Someone with these three qualities is placed in hell as if delivered there.
translation_text.an3.147:2.1: Someone with three qualities is placed in heaven as if delivered there.
translation_text.an3.147:2.3: Blameless deeds by way of body, speech, and mind.
translation_text.an3.147:2.4: Someone with these three qualities is placed in heaven as if delivered there.”
